    A

    ADD - Enum constant in enum class src.model.Operator
    Addition operator.

    B

    BMI_CALCULATOR - Static variable in class src.utils.Constants
    Menu option for BMI calculator
    BMICalculator - Class in src.service
    BMICalculator that support calculate bmi value as well as return bmi status
    BMICalculator() - Constructor for class src.service.BMICalculator
    Construction
    BMIStatus - Enum Class in src.model
    Enum represents BMI status

    C

    calculate(double, Operator, double) - Method in class src.service.NormalCalculator
    Perform calculation based on operator
    calculateBMIStatus(double) - Method in class src.service.BMICalculator
    Get BMI Value Status form BMI original Value
    calculateBMIValue(double, double) - Method in class src.service.BMICalculator
    Calculate BMI value
    CalculatorController - Class in src.controller
    Main Controller that help program control the workflow through user inputs
    CalculatorController() - Constructor for class src.controller.CalculatorController
    Constructor
    checkInputNumber(String) - Method in class src.validator.InputValidator
    Validate and parse double number
    checkOperator(String) - Method in class src.validator.InputValidator
    Validate operator.
    Constants - Class in src.utils
    Contains all constant values used in the application

    D

    DIVIDE - Enum constant in enum class src.model.Operator
    Division operator.

    E

    EQUAL - Enum constant in enum class src.model.Operator
    Equal operator.
    EXIT - Static variable in class src.utils.Constants
    Menu option for exiting program

    F

    FAT - Enum constant in enum class src.model.BMIStatus
    BMI indicates obesity
    FAT_LIMIT - Static variable in class src.utils.Constants
    BMI threshold for fat status

    G

    getSymbol() - Method in enum class src.model.Operator
    Get operator symbol.

    I

    InputValidator - Class in src.validator
    Responsible for validate the input
    InputValidator() - Constructor for class src.validator.InputValidator
    Constructer

    J

    J1sp0009 - Class in src
    J1.S.P0009 - Calculator Program support calculate BMI value and normal operation
    J1sp0009() - Constructor for class src.J1sp0009
    Constructor

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class src.J1sp0009
    Entry point of program
    MULTIPLY - Enum constant in enum class src.model.Operator
    Multiplication operator.

    N

    NORMAL_CALCULATOR - Static variable in class src.utils.Constants
    Menu option for normal calculator
    NormalCalculator - Class in src.service
    NormalCalculate that support for normal operation such as add, subtract, multiply, etc
    NormalCalculator() - Constructor for class src.service.NormalCalculator
    Constructor

    O

    Operator - Enum Class in src.model
    Enum represents all operators for project
    OVERWEIGHT - Enum constant in enum class src.model.BMIStatus
    BMI is above healthy range
    OVERWEIGHT_LIMIT - Static variable in class src.utils.Constants
    BMI threshold for overweight status

    P

    POWER - Enum constant in enum class src.model.Operator
    Exponent operator.

    R

    runProgram() - Method in class src.controller.CalculatorController
    Run main workflow

    S

    src - package src
    Root package of the Calculator Program application, J1.S.P0009
    src.controller - package src.controller
    Contains controller classes responsible for coordinating application workflows and handling user interaction logic
    src.model - package src.model
    Contains data models and enumerations used throughout the calculator application
    src.service - package src.service
    Contains business logic classes used for arithmetic calculations and BMI processing
    src.utils - package src.utils
    Contains utility classes and application-wide constant values
    src.validator - package src.validator
    Contains validation utilities responsible for validating user input data and ensuring application data integrity
    STANDARD - Enum constant in enum class src.model.BMIStatus
    BMI is within healthy range
    STANDARD_LIMIT - Static variable in class src.utils.Constants
    BMI threshold for standard status
    SUBTRACT - Enum constant in enum class src.model.Operator
    Subtraction operator.

    U

    UNDER_STANDARD - Enum constant in enum class src.model.BMIStatus
    BMI is below standard level
    UNDER_STANDARD_LIMIT - Static variable in class src.utils.Constants
    BMI threshold for under standard status
    useBMICalculator() - Method in class src.controller.CalculatorController
    Execute BMI calculator workflow
    useNormalCalculator() - Method in class src.controller.CalculatorController
    Execute Normal calculator workflow

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class src.model.BMIStatus
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class src.model.Operator
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class src.model.BMIStatus
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class src.model.Operator
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    VERY_FAT - Enum constant in enum class src.model.BMIStatus
    BMI indicates severe obesity
